PlaceShipStructureStep1.title: Building Ship Structure
PlaceShipStructureStep1.description:
Now lets start expanding the ship!

[color=LIGHT_GREEN]Click[/color] the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Building[/color] button or press {building_menu} to open the [color=PURPLE]Building[/color] menu.

PlaceShipStructureStep2.description:
[color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] forms the basic framework for all ships and is required to support other components like [color=KHAKI]Deck Plating[/color].

To begin with, select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Ship Structure[/color] button.

PlaceShipStructureStep3.description:
Now [color=LIGHT_GREEN]click and drag[/color] using the {select} over the white highlighted area to place down some blueprints, then wait for your crew to finish building them.

If you are running low on [color=KHAKI]Titanium[/color], designate more [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] or [color=KHAKI]Asteroids[/color] to be worked on.
